rows.label: qev025101_MSG0001
rows.name: Dammit!! Was I too late!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025101_MSG0002
rows.name: ...Did you witness her jump, ne?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025101_MSG0003
rows.name:
Hey, I'd like to ask you a few
questions. Is that alright?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025101_JNK0010
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev025101_SEL0011
rows.name: Offer your cooperation to help.

rows.label: qev025101_JNK0020
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: qev025101_SEL0021
rows.name: Politely decline, as you do not want to get involved in trouble.

rows.label: qev025101_MSG0004
rows.name:
Thank you! I appreciate your
cooperation. You're very
friendly and wonderful, ne![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025101_MSG0005
rows.name:
...Hey! As if I could let such an
important first discoverer slip away, yo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025101_MSG0006
rows.name:
Sorry, but I'm going to need
you to tag along, yo. Come on,
don't look so annoyed, ne![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025101_MSG0007
rows.name:
My name is Aqual, ne. Believe it or not,
I'm the very first Ma-non BLADE, sa.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025101_MSG0008
rows.name:
As a Companion, I go around resolving
disputes within the city... Mainly
incidents involving Ma-non.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025101_MSG0009
rows.name: Um... Your name is [ST:playername ], ne.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025101_MSG0010
rows.name:
Well then, [ST:playername ]. I'll ask you point-blank,
but could you actually be the culprit
behind this incident, ne?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025101_JNK0030
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev025101_SEL0031
rows.name: Testify that it wasn't you.

rows.label: qev025101_JNK0040
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev025101_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask why this jumping incident is being treated as a "murder case".

rows.label: qev025101_MSG0011
rows.name:
Sorry, sorry. Well, there's no way the
culprit of a serial murder case would
be loitering around the scene, ne.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025101_MSG0012
rows.name: ...Eh? Why is it a murder case, you ask?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025101_MSG0013
rows.name:
To ask a question like that... You
must not be the culprit. But you
certainly have a good eye for detail, ne![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025101_MSG0014
rows.name:
...Lately, there's been a string of strange
murder cases targeting Ma-non, ne.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025101_MSG0015
rows.name:
So I suspect that this girl was probably
caught up in that case as well, yo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025101_MSG0016
rows.name:
Because, you see... Even if we
Ma-non were to end our own lives,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025101_MSG0017
rows.name:
we would never do something as
scary and irrational as jumping
off such a tall building, ne.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025101_JNK0050
rows.name: Impressed

rows.label: qev025101_SEL0051
rows.name: Agree with Aqual's deduction.

rows.label: qev025101_JNK0060
rows.name: Doubt

rows.label: qev025101_SEL0061
rows.name: Ask for the basis of why they wouldn't do something irrational.

rows.label: qev025101_MSG0018
rows.name:
Right, right? There's definitely a vicious
culprit behind this... And they are still
targeting the lives of Ma-non right now![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025101_MSG0019
rows.name:
If it were a Ma-non, they would build the
ultimate euthanasia device and pass away
without a single ounce of suffering, yo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025101_MSG0020
rows.name:
Jumping is emotional and nonsense,
sa. That's not the Ma-non way, yo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025101_MSG0021
rows.name:
There must absolutely be a culprit
behind this. And they are still
targeting the lives of Ma-non right now![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025101_MSG0022
rows.name:
...Hey, you're a BLADE too, right?
If you'd like, could you help me
investigate this case, ne?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025101_MSG0023
rows.name:
I'll pay you a decent reward,
sa! Hey, come on, please?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025101_MSG0024
rows.name:
Heheh, Jim was right when he
said to rely on your comrades
when you're in trouble, ne.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025101_MSG0025
rows.name:
Well then, I'd like you to start
questioning right away, yo. There's
an Earthling I'd like you to check with.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025101_JNK0070
rows.name: Interest

rows.label: qev025101_SEL0071
rows.name: Ask for details about what Aqual will be doing.

rows.label: qev025101_JNK0080
rows.name: Doubt

rows.label: qev025101_SEL0081
rows.name: Ask about the contents of the questioning investigation.

rows.label: qev025101_MSG0026
rows.name:
I'll be investigating the scene
here, yo. I'm sure the culprit must
have left some trace behind, ne.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025101_MSG0027
rows.name:
...So, I want you to go to a super-delicious
pizza shop called Army Pizza, ne.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025101_MSG0028
rows.name:
If my memory is correct, the manager
there named Powell should have been
close with this girl... Duduma, ne.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025101_MSG0029
rows.name:
Her past, what she liked...
Anything is fine. Please go ask
him various things about her, yo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025101_MSG0030
rows.name:
There's a super-delicious
pizza shop called Army Pizza
in the Commercial Area, ne.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025101_MSG0031
rows.name:
If my memory is correct, the manager
there named Powell should have been
close with this girl... Duduma, ne.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025101_MSG0032
rows.name:
I'll be investigating the scene
here, so please go ask him
various things about her, yo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025101_MSG0033
rows.name:
I'll be investigating the scene
here, yo. I'm sure the culprit must
have left some trace behind, ne.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025101_MSG0034
rows.name:
...Yeah! I'm counting on you,
yo! Let the two of us solve
this difficult case together![ST:wait ]
